reviews.review_text:
Nice park Friendly staff
Had issues with power on first site but moved to the next site over and a different power pole all good
We were supposed to be on site 11 but don't know why we were moved as 11 was perfect for our small business and trailer plus nearer to our friends
Sadly to far out of town for us and riding a bike into town is not for the faint hearted

We stayed in a cabin at Harbour View caravan park. Don’t write this little park off. Go back and check out the hard work of the new owners. Our experience was terrific.  Beautiful bed , a comfy couch to watch tv and clean bathroom. |Yes a little dated, but give me any caravan park of the same vintage that isn’t.  Mozzies are always a problem and flies are just a pest too. Weather was good. We enjoyed our stay and would choose to stay again. |There are multiple coffee shops and carts in the township. Mobil service station has been revamped and looking so much better with hot food .

Large spread out sites, plenty of room for our boats.  Close to boat ramp (only 200 metres away).  Has a boat wash & fish cleaning station too.
Getting plenty of crabs 🦀 & King George Whiting as per photos.  Has swimming pool & happy hour is at 5pm daily.

Great views, big sites, clean amenities and pool area.
So quiet
Clean, well kept, accommodating management and great location.|Stone's throw from water and town.|Really enjoyed our stay !

Great quiet location with beautiful view over the harbour.  The cabins are well equipped and comfortable. Managers were very friendly. |Only a few minutes drive into town.   The way the park is set out parking was never a problem getting in or out.

Wow isn't this a hidden gem a little way out of town but worth it one of the best since leaving Perth
Massive sites well sheltered and beautifully kept grounds swimming pool and great children's play ground and accommodating management all for $35 a night for powered site

Just few minutes from Cowell. We have the cabin number 7.  Good position, clean and with normal kitchenware. Patio with view on green where kangaroos are in the morning. To complete the remodeling need only the change of the plastic on the floor.

This is one of the best, the managers are awesome. We came here a group of 15 people in 5 vehicles, used their powered sites and had amazing time. Please visit Cowell and stay here to support such a beautiful community.

We stayed for one night in a cabin prior to the Cleve Running Festival. Excellent uninterrupted views of the harbour and only a very short drive into Cowell. The bed was clean and comfortable. The cabins are dated, and we found that ours hadn't been cleaned very well - food stuck to the floor, hair on the chairs, unclean dishes, dust etc. There also was no hand towel provided. When checking in, the lady was polite, although we weren't offered any information about the park or Cowell. Having said all of that, I would stay here as a stopover again in the future.
Management very obliging. Ablutions clean and tidy. One block currently has no hot water (18th Sep).
This place is quiet and peaceful. I love it

This is a great park with views over the bay. The sites are super spacious and it is a large park. It had everything we needed, clean amenities, laundry and good access. I would highly recommend this park. I have been to 27 caravan parks in the last few months and this is one of the best. 5 stars.

Had a drive though powered caravan site for 2 nights in April 2024.  Older park. Quiet location just out of town. Bush setting, dry and dusty sites. We seemed to be the only people in the park that didn't have a fishing boat ! Pleasant reception.
Loverly site - dirt sites but that suites us well and it is dry SA, owners are loverly and overall a top stop.

I stayed with my partner for a couple of weeks,
All round a pleasant friendly experience.

The owners/managers Judy and dale work above and beyond to maintain beautiful greenery, ***Plenty of shade, Massive sites, Good wind covour*** many chirping birds and you may even spot a lizard.
old in need of new but always clean shower and toilet facilities, there are worse in surrounding parks that I have seen.
Good washing machines.

As the name says there is a beautiful view of the nearby cowell Bay.

This park has more than any park in the area!

With a well serviced clean swimming pool for those hot days.

Beachside access.

A next to brand new kitchen, including t.v and lounge, the kitchen you will find many mature age friendly welcoming people entertaining at happy hour most afternoons.

Beside the close nit mature age couples that seem to of been coming for decades, there are always families young couples staying letting their kids run free in the park playground, a trusted family orientated environment.
The owners are fussy with who enters, being always booked out.

There is a boat ramp at the parks door step, fish cleaning facilities provided.
Oysters, squid and blue swimmers in abundance.

My partner and I rarely have to fish with all the beautiful people at this park who always bringing us over there catch.

In town they have a large grocery store, bakery, fish and chip shop and pubs are all fantastic, I'm glad we stopped.

Wonderful stay here with bay views.  Fully informed by management on which way the sun will be and when strong winds are expected etc. and very accomodating.  Spacious sites. Lovely  pool & amenities.  Good value.  Short drive into town but nice & quiet.  Boat ramp very close too & dog friendly.  Go into town on a Wednesday night for spit roast pork meal $18. (The pub across from the foreshore that is)

My second visit to this park, I stayed in one of the ensuite cabins. It was very clean and comfortable. The owners were extremely welcoming and made my stay even better. Thank you and I will be back again.

Far from being our best camping from Perth to Adelaide. Checkin closes at 6 pm and even if one calls them in advance they wouldn't make even a 5 min exception, even though the owners literally live inside the campground. Mosquitoes at night, but maybe because of the weather.  Swimming pool opens at 10 am (after check out) and closes at 6pm, which conveniently prevents any use if you come for one night. On the plus side it wasn't too expensive, the campground is quiet and facilities are clean. Can't judge the rooms as had a campervan. Given the other reviews, maybe they have returning guests and don't necessarily expect tourists. All in all I'd pass (and pass Cowell too...) unless you don't have a choice.
Clean amenities, close to town, quiet, great pool and beautiful setting. Generous size for powered site. Owners are fantastic. Highly recommend anyone to stay here.
What an awesome park great bush setting staff are fantastic and amenities spotless, great views of the harbour would highly recommend
Stayed at a powered sites overlooking the harbour.  Such a beautiful relaxing place,  sites not too close and a lovely rural setting.  Couldn't fault it.

Loved our few days at this quiet spacious bush camp.  No problem to pick a preferred spot  up front for a water view or up the back for privacy and wind shelter.  Super clean amenities, hot showers, peaceful bush surroundings, couple minutes from town, sure you can stay hooked up if needed. $35 a night power and water.
